import axios from'axios';const API_BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'/api';const api=axios.create({baseURL:API_BASE_URL,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},withCredentials:false// JWT in Authorization header, no cookies needed

window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('auth:logout'));return Promise.reject(refreshError);}}return Promise.reject(error);});// Module-level token storage (NOT localStorage - security requirement)
